productDisplayName: W Women Thread Work Red Kurta
description: Composition Red kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with woven panel detailing, spread shirt collar with a slit neckline, half buttoned placket, thread work on the chest and the hemline, and a vented curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this retro-style piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
